CWE: CWE-915: Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes
exploit_info: The mathjs expression parser has two vulnerabilities: (1) setSafeProperty on arrays allows setting arbitrary properties like .map, enabling prototype chain traversal to Function.constructor. (2) DenseMatrix.get() does not validate that index is an actual Array, allowing duck-typed objects to hijack internal reduce() calls.
